expectations.evidence: without_skill configuration - generate script not available
DashboardSidebar component with data-testid='dashboard-sidebar' containing nav links
DashboardHeader component with data-testid='dashboard-header' containing title and actions
md: breakpoints used: md:flex, md:hidden, md:p-6 in layout and subcomponents
children: React.ReactNode in DashboardLayoutProps, rendered inside main element
Tailwind classes used throughout: flex, h-screen, overflow-hidden, rounded-lg, etc.
Only useState for mobileMenuOpen and collapsed (UI state allowed); no business logic
No fetch or axios calls in any component file
